items.title: Vance: ‘No chance’ U.S. will be in drawn-out war in Middle East
items.description: As President Trump contemplates military action in Iran, the vice president told The Post he still sees himself as a “skeptic” of overseas military in...

items.title: Why Trump got involved in a state Senate race — and why he might lose
items.description: Phil Berger got an unusual endorsement from President Donald Trump after helping him redraw the House map. It might not be enough to keep his seat.

items.title: As mourners celebrate Jesse Jackson, can they carry on his movement?
items.description: Civil rights icon Jesse Jackson leaves behind a movement that lacks a single unifying leader, but his legacy of inclusion could help it carry on.

items.title: Fed seeks to block Justice Dept. subpoenas in Powell probe
items.description: The Federal Reserve is asking a court to throw out subpoenas issued as part of the Justice Department’s inquiry into Fed Chair Jerome H. Powell.
